facts: SK Innovation planned to increase battery production capacity from 1.9 to 3.9 GWh per year at the end of 2018.
The expanded battery production was intended to supply Kia and Mercedes.
In July 2022, SK Group announced a $22 billion investment in the United States semiconductor, green energy bioscience and other technology industries.
SK Group will invest over $52 billion in the United States by 2025.
SKC operates a large capacity of film plant in Covington, Georgia, United States.
